Events

Events

Event

Halls Close for Spring 2026

May 15, 2026

12:00 pm

Students, make sure you meet with your RA leading up to moving out to get the check-out procedures. Failure to do so will result in improper check-out charges. Additional charges may also apply if damages are assessed.

Read more about Halls Close for Spring 2026
Event

Online Room Selection (OLRS)

May 18, 2026

to May 29, 2026

Fall 2026 First-Time In College (FTIC) students who have completed their housing application and contract will qualify to participate in Online Room Selection. Additional details will be emailed to qualifying students in May.

Read more about Online Room Selection (OLRS)
Event

Move-In: Maymester

May 19, 2026

2:00 pm

Maymester students move into Nunnelee Hall.

Event

Memorial Day Holiday

May 25, 2026

All university offices will be closed for the Memorial Day holiday. Students should contact their RA or RA on Duty as needed, or emergency services in the event of an emergency.

Read more about Memorial Day Holiday
Event

Summer Session 1 Move-In

June 5, 2026

2:00 pm

Students enrolled in Summer Session 1 may move-in beginning June 5 at 2:00pm at Nunnelee Hall.

Event

Maymester Only Students Move Out

June 5, 2026

6:00 pm

Maymester only students move out of Nunnelee Hall.

Event

Independence Day Holiday

July 3, 2026

All university offices will be closed for the Independence Day holiday. Students should contact their RA or RA on Duty as needed, or emergency services in the event of an emergency.

Read more about Independence Day Holiday
Event

Summer Session II Move-In

July 7, 2026

12:00 pm

Students enrolled in Summer Session II may move-in beginning July 7th at 12:00pm at Nunnelee Hall.

Event

Summer Session 1 Move-Out

July 7, 2026

6:00 pm

Summer Session 1 students who are not continuing into Summer Session 2 must be moved out of their Nunnelee Hall space no later than July 7th at 6:00pm CST. Students who are continuing into Summer Session 2 will remain in their same…

Read more about Summer Session 1 Move-Out
Event

Upper Division Panhellenic Move-In

August 7, 2026

Upper-division Panhellenic students will move into Hathorn and Cresswell Halls on Friday, August 7, 2026. Students will receive email notification regarding their specific chapter’s designated move-in timeslot, with additional details and…

Read more about Upper Division Panhellenic Move-In
Event

Summer Session II Move-Out

August 7, 2026

6:00 pm

All summer students must be moved out of their Nunnelee Hall space no later than August 7th at 6:00pm CST.

Read more about Summer Session II Move-Out
Event

Famous Maroon Band Move-In Day

August 9, 2026

The Famous Maroon Band residents will primarily move in on Sunday, August 9, 2026. Additional details and instruction will be emailed to students prior to their arrival. Note: - FMB Drumline will move in on August 4th. - FMB Student…

Read more about Famous Maroon Band Move-In Day
